vqa_calls.context: Goal: Main gameplay table for v0.1.0 playable Doudizhu hand. Requirements: procedural table background, AI panels, bottom cards, current trick/status, player hand, action buttons, result banner contracts from SCENES.md and ASSETS.md. Verify: Main scene shows AI Left/Right panels, center trick/status area, bottom player hand area, action bar; v0.1.0-M1 through M8 visible through dealt state, landlord roles, selection highlight, trick/error state, pass/turn status, hint result, AI recent/count changes, result/replay; no text overlaps action buttons, cards, or seat panels at 1280x720. Visible state only; do not infer prior play history.
vqa_calls.output_summary: Main scene capture satisfies SCENES.md acceptance criteria for readable procedural table UI at 1280x720.
